item.title: Fender Squier Affinity Jaguar Bass H - Charcoal Frost Metallic — $275
item.description:
$275 · Excellent · Wide Load Custom Guitars

New, never played. Includes basic setup and SIT Semi-Flat strings.

From Fender:
A superb gateway into the time-honored Fender® family, the Squier® Affinity Series® Jaguar® Bass H delivers legendary design and quintessential tone for today's aspiring bassist. This Jaguar Bass features several player-friendly refinements such as a thin and lightweight body, an easy-playing 32" medium scale length, and vintage-style open-gear tuning machines for smooth, accurate tuning. Loaded with a Squier humbucking pickup for fat, punchy tone, this model is ready to help lay the foundation for any player at any stage.

Features

Thin and lightweight body

32" medium scale length

Squier humbucking pickup

Slim and comfortable "C"-shaped neck profile

Open-gear tuning machines

item.title: 2026 F Bass BN5 5-String Bass Active EQ with Pale Moon Ebony Fretboard ~ Matte Black — $6,999
item.description:
$6,999 · Brand New · G-Brat's Guitars

Black never goes out of style... unless it's attached to a boring bass. Thankfully, that problem doesn't exist here.

The F Bass BN5 is what happens when one of the world's finest bass builders decides that world-class tone isn't enough—they also build something you'll find yourself staring at long after you've put it back in the case. The matte black finish, open-pore ash body, and absolutely outrageous Pale Moon Ebony fingerboard make this instrument look every bit as refined as it sounds. (And yes... I'm completely obsessed with the matching Pale Moon Ebony control knobs.)

Specs:

  • Model: F Bass BN5 5-String
  • Finish: Matte Black
  • Body: Ash With Open Pore Grain
  • Neck: Maple, Bolt-On
  • Fingerboard: Pale Moon Ebony With Side Dots Only
  • Headstock: Matching Matte Black
  • Scale Length: 34.5"
  • Frets: 22
  • String Spacing: 19mm
  • Pickups: Two Hum-Cancelling F Bass Stacked Single-Coil Pickups
  • Preamp: F Bass Active Preamp
  • Controls: Neck Pickup Volume, Bridge Pickup Volume, Low Boost, Mid Boost, High Boost, Tone Control With Push/Pull Active/Passive Switching
  • Control Knobs: Matching Pale Moon Ebony
  • Hardware: Black
  • Tuners: F Bass Branded Sealed Tuners
  • Warranty: Full Manufacturer Warranty Included Through G-Brat's Guitars, An Authorized F Bass Dealer
  • Weight: 9.6 LBS
  • Serial #: 210126

Condition:

This BN5 is Brand New, has never been owned, and includes the full factory warranty through G-Brat's Guitars, an authorized F Bass dealer.

Let's address the elephant in the room...

That fingerboard.

I've seen a lot of Pale Moon Ebony over the years, but this one looks like it was hand-selected by someone who refused to settle for merely "nice." Every streak, every contrast, every inch of it is spectacular. Then F Bass decided to make matching control knobs out of the same wood, because apparently showing off is encouraged in Canada.

Plug it in, and things only get better. The stacked single-coils are dead quiet but incredibly alive, delivering huge lows, articulate mids, sparkling highs, and enough clarity to expose every note... including the ones you wish nobody had heard. The active/passive push-pull gives you two completely usable personalities without a single gimmick.

Buying this bass also comes with one unexpected side effect...

You'll suddenly develop the strange habit of opening the case "just for a second."

Thirty minutes later you'll still be standing there.

Don't worry.

The bass understands.

Whoever brings this baby home is going to be completely STOKED!


LET'S GO!!


WHILE YOU ARE HERE, GO AHEAD AND LOOK AT MY OTHER LISTINGS!!


Me- I have a 100% positive feedback rating, and intend to keep it that way! So please don't worry! You're in good hands here!!


Shipping- We take pride in packing our guitars well, and shipping them quickly. Here are the shipping rates, covering the planet earth:

USA - $119 with UPS

Canada, Hawaii, Alaska, Puerto Rico - $169

Australia, New Zealand, Switzerland, China, Brazil, Argentina - $450

All Other Worldwide Shipping - $299


Factory Warranty- 

We are an authorized dealer for: Knaggs, Ken Smith, F Bass, Trussart, Warwick, Breedlove and Warrior, so for these instruments, if listed as NEW, there is a full factory warranty. For all other brands, or if listed as USED, there is no warranty available.


Return Policy- 

We do accept returns up to 14 days from the point of the initial sale, which means that the guitar must be back in our possession within this 14 day period. However, please be aware of the following conditions: If for any reason you wish to return the guitar, just call or email me directly, within 24 hours of your receiving the item, and let me know that you want to return it. Once we receive the guitar back, in the same condition, you will receive a refund, less a $50 restock fee. Also be aware that the initial shipping fee is not refundable under any circumstances.


International Buyers - We, at G-Brat's Guitars, are HONORED to do business with anybody on the planet earth... So international buyers are VERY welcome here! 


THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR LOOKING!!!

item.title: Dingwall Guitars Adam "Nolly" Getgood NG Signature 4 String - Matte Blue To Purple Colorshift (Canada Exclusive Limited Edition) — $2,483.29
item.description:
$2,483.29 · Brand New · The Vibrato Bar

ATTENTION! There are NO TARIFFS if you are in the USA and buy from us, GUITARS ARE NOT IMPACTED. So take advantage of our best in class pricing and service. And for our local Canadian friends - all guitars ship coast to coast for free as always :)

We’re actively buying used gear and entire guitar collections, and we love taking trades—offering competitive value on each. As an appointment-only gallery, we provide a personalized experience tailored just for you. For our best pricing, current inventory, or to schedule your visit, simply Google our shop and reach out directly via phone, text, or email.

Matte Blue to Purple Colorshift, a brand new Canada Exclusive limited edition finish you won’t find anywhere else. Once these are gone, they’re gone. The shift between deep blue and rich purple is smooth and constant, changing with every angle and lighting condition in a way that feels fluid and alive without being over the top.

It fits the NG platform perfectly—modern, sharp, and a little aggressive without trying too hard. The color shift does all the work here, giving the bass a look that stays interesting every time you pick it up.

The Dingwall NG Adam "Nolly" Getgood Signature Bass is a powerhouse designed with Periphery’s Adam "Nolly" Getgood to deliver unmatched punch and clarity for modern rock and metal.

Its alder body and bolt-on 5-piece maple neck ensure exceptional resonance and durability, while the maple fingerboard with 24 banjo-sized frets provides effortless playability. The multi-scale design (34”–36.25” on the 4-string) optimizes tension and note definition, especially in lower tunings. Dingwall’s FD3n neodymium pickups, paired with the Darkglass Tone Capsule preamp, offer a versatile tonal range, with a 4-position Quad-Tone pickup selector and an active/passive toggle for ultimate flexibility. Licensed Hipshot Ultra-lite tuners and a staggered bridge enhance sustain and tuning stability.

This updated NG also features the latest spec refinements, including black hardware, a minimalist bridge, a mini toggle active/passive switch, Dingwall string bullets, and neck binding.

Endorsed by renowned bassists such as Tony Levin (Liquid Tension Experiment), Josh Gilbert (Spiritbox), and William Shively (Boyz II Men), the Dingwall NG Signature Bass stands as a testament to superior craftsmanship and innovative design.

Weight: 8lbs 4oz
Body Wood: Alder
Neck Wood: 5-Piece Maple, Bolt-On
Fingerboard Wood: Maple, 24 ‘Banjo-Sized’ Frets, 9.45” Radius
Scale Length: 34-36.25”
Pickups: Dingwall FD3n, Neodymium Magnets
Preamp: Darkglass Tone Capsule
Controls: Master Volume, 4-Position Quad-Tone Pickup Selector, 3-Band Active EQ (Bass, Lo-Mid, Hi-Mid), Active/Passive Toggle Switch
Bridge: Dingwall Minimalist Bridge
String Spacing at the Bridge: 19mm
Tuners: Licensed Hipshot Ultralite
Nut: Graphtech Black Tusq
Pickguard: Carbon Fiber Print
Case: Dingwall Padded Gigbag

The Vibrato Bar is proud to be an authorized dealer for top-tier brands such as PRS Guitars, PRS Guitars Private Stock, Suhr, James Tyler, Tom Anderson, LsL Instruments, Rock N Roll Relics, Iconic Guitars, Mayones Guitars, Teuffel Guitars, OD Guitars, Mezzabarba Amplifiers, Shin’s Music/Dumbloid and more. We offer an exceptional range of guitars to cater to every guitarist's needs.

item.title: Dingwall SP1 5-String Bass Matte Ducati Pearl White — $2,605
item.description:
$2,605 · Brand New · Ish Guitars

Dingwall SP1 5-String Bass Matte Ducati Pearl White

Weight: 9.0 lbs 

DESCRIPTION

The SP1 is the latest addition to our ever-expanding Ready To Play range and, as the model name suggests, draws much of its inspiration from the Custom Shop Super P. The initial brief was to come up with a more affordable instrument that combined elements of Leo Fender’s iconic blueprint with some of the innovative features for which Dingwall Guitars are now famous, including the customary multi-scale fingerboard. 

The first major change made to the SP1 was a thinner body profile, resulting in a lightweight instrument that still delivers a solid, resonant tone. The body is crafted from alder, paired with a bolt-on neck made from a single piece of maple. The rosewood fingerboard is flawlessly finished, featuring smoothly rounded edges and 22 banjo-sized frets.

In addition to its multi-scale design, one of the most visually distinctive features of the SP1 is its scratchplate. Originally a hand-painted design by Hugh Fisher, the artwork has since been digitized and UV printed. Each pickguard is slightly transparent, allowing the body color to subtly influence its appearance. Thanks to the transparent material, virtually any color can be printed, offering nearly limitless visual customization.

According to Sheldon Dingwall, “It’s no coincidence that the first bassists to recognize Dingwall’s potential were session players—musicians who play and record bass every day. These professionals need an instrument that’s versatile, studio-ready, comfortable, and easy to use. The SP1 delivers on all fronts, and it’s likely we’ll be seeing a lot more of them in the future.”

The SP1 features a passive electronics setup—no batteries, no onboard EQ—yet its tonal versatility remains exceptional due to high-quality tonewoods, alnico-loaded pickups, and precision construction. The controls are simple: a front volume knob, a rear master tone knob, and the Quad-Tone Pickup Selector located between them. This selector offers four distinct settings: fully anti-clockwise activates the front pickup alone; one click clockwise engages both pickups in series; another click sets them in parallel; and the final position selects the rear pickup by itself.

SPECS

Weight: 9.0 lbs 

Case: Dingwall Padded Gigbag Included

Year: 2026

Made in: Indonesia / Canada (Hybrid Manufacturing)

Body: Alder

Neck: 1-piece Maple, Bolt-On

Fingerboard: Rosewood

Scale Length: 5-String: 32" to 35"

Pickups: Dingwall Dual-P (Neck); Dingwall FD3n (Bridge)

Electronics: Passive

Controls: Master volume, 4-Position Quad-Tone pickup selector, Master tone

Bridge: Dingwall ‘Minimalist’ one-piece bridge 

String Spacing at the Bridge:: 18mm (5-string)

Pickup Selector: Position 1: Bridge Solo, Position 2: Bridge/Neck (Parallel), Position 3:  Bridge/Neck (Series), Position 4:Neck Solo

Tuners: Open gear

Nut: Graphtech Black Tusq

SETUP & INSPECTED BY OUR TECH TEAM

All of our guitars come with a FREE professional setup to a comfortable action as specified by that instrument’s manufacturer. Our setups always include inspection of (and necessary adjustment to): action, intonation, tremolo angle, truss rod, frets, nut, bridge, and more. We can accommodate special setup requests - additional charges and/or shipping delays of 1-2 business days could occur.

INDIVIDUALLY PHOTOGRAPHED

After 15 years of innovation in our photography process, Ish Guitars has developed a way to get you the most accurate true-to-life color of every instrument we sell. We never embellish, oversaturate, or misrepresent our images, so that your buying experience can be as much like visiting our showroom as possible. Keep in mind that various computer screens can show colors a bit differently, so the color on your screen may not match the real thing perfectly no matter how hard we try. Also, unless otherwise noted, we individually list and photo every piece of gear that comes through our doors.

HEAR A LIVE DEMO

Experience our innovative Video Appointment service! Connect with our Gear Experts to hear this instrument played live over Zoom and receive one-on-one guidance. Contact us to schedule your appointment!

item.title: Ibanez SR300EDXFBM 4-String Electric Bass Guitar - Frozen Black Glacier Matte — $479.99
item.description:
$479.99 · Brand New · Butler Music

Ibanez SR300EDXFBM 4-String Electric Bass Guitar - Frozen Black Glacier Matte

For 30 years the SR has given bass players a modern alternative. With its continued popularity, Ibanez is constantly endeavoring to answer the wider needs of a variety of players, at a variety of budgets. But no matter what the specs, the heart is the same-SR continues to excite with its smooth, fast neck, lightweight body, and perfectly matched electronics.

Features
  • SR Series
  • Body: Nyatoh
  • 5-Piece bolt-on neck: Maple / Walnut
  • Fingerboard: Jatoba
  • Fingerboard inlays: White dot
  • Fingerboard radius: 305 mm (12")
  • Scale: 864 mm (34")
  • Nut width: 38 mm (1.49")
  • Plastic nut
  • 24 Medium frets
  • Pickups: 2 PowerSpan Dual Coil Humbuckers( bridge and neck)
  • Ibanez Custom electronics with 3-band EQ
  • Volume (push/pull), balance, bass, middle and treble controls
  • 3-Way "Power Tap" switch
  • Accu-cast B500 bridge
  • Gold-plated machine heads
  • Strings: Daddario EXL165 .045 / .065 / .085 / .105
  • Neck and body finish: Matt polyurethane

item.title: Ibanez SR5A250 United States 250th Anniversary Limited Edition 5-String Bass Guitar, Panga Panga Fingerboard, Red White and Blue — $1,299.99
item.description:
$1,299.99 · Brand New · GearTree

Description

With its commanding voice and striking stage presence, the Ibanez Premium SR5A250 stands as a high-performance salute to the bold American spirit. Marking the 250th anniversary of the United States, this limited-edition 5-string bass pairs a red, white and blue finish with the high-end craftsmanship of the Ibanez Premium line. Beneath the commemorative design is a precision-built instrument, featuring an African mahogany body and a five-piece panga panga and purpleheart neck reinforced with KTS titanium rods for exceptional stability and sustain. Nordstrand Big Break pickups deliver a powerful, articulate voice, while the active three-band EQ, EQ bypass and three-way mid frequency switch provide a wide, highly controllable tonal range. It’s a modern SR built for clarity, control and consistency—all wrapped in a striking, celebratory finish that pays homage to a historic milestone.

Product Features

  • Limited-Edition SR Bass Celebrates The 250th Anniversary Of The United States
  • Bold Red, White And Blue Finish With Matching Headstock Delivers Bold, Celebratory Style
  • African Mahogany Body Provides Warmth, Clarity And Strong Sustain
  • 5-Piece Panga Panga/Purpleheart Atlas Neck Enhances Stability And Resonance
  • KTS Titanium Rods Reinforce Neck Strength And Improve Sustain
  • Bound Panga Panga Fingerboard Provides Tight Lows And Articulate Attack
  • 24 Medium Frets With Premium Fret Edge Treatment Ensures Smooth Playability
  • Nordstrand Big Break Split-Coil Pickups Deliver Punchy, Articulate Tone
  • Ibanez Custom 3-Band EQ, 3-Way Mid Frequency Switch And EQ Bypass Switch Ensure Total Tonal Control
  • MR5S Bridge Allows Adjustable String Spacing And Accurate Intonation
  • Gotoh Tuners And Graph Tech Black TUSQ XL Nut Ensure Tuning Stability
  • Gig Bag Included For Secure Transport To Gigs And Studio Sessions

Attributes

  • Color: Red White and Blue

Technical Specifications

  • Type: Electric
  • # of Strings: 5
  • Orientation: Right
  • Body Material: Mahogany
  • Body Finish: Satin
  • Neck Joint: Bolt-On
  • Neck Material: Panga Panga
  • Scale Length: 34"
  • # of Frets: 24
  • Nut Width: 1.77"
  • Pickup Configuration: SS
  • Features: Case Included, Limited Edition
  • Neck Radius: 12"
  • Nut Material: Tusq
  • Tuning Machines: Gotoh Machine Heads
  • Electronics: 1 x Volume, 1 x Balancer, 3-band EQ, EQ Bypass Switch, 3-Way Mid Frequency Switch
  • Case/Gig Bag: Gig Bag
  • Controls: Active/Passive
  • Pickup - Neck: Nordstrand Big Break Split-coil
  • Pickup - Bridge: Nordstrand Big Break Split-coil
  • Fingerboard Material: Panga Panga

item.title: Lamprecht Johann Lamprecht mid-90s - spruce & maple — $7,700
item.description:
$7,700 · Excellent · Charlie's Gear Locker

Johann Lamprecht 3/4 Double Bass

 

This is an excellent bass expertly handcrafted by Johann Lamprecht. I have had it for a number years and been very happy. The bass is in excellent condition, is fully solid carved, with select spruce top and maple back and sides, has great tone, great bottom and easy to play. It is maple in color with a 42" string length. Former primary instrument of Marvin Topolsky with the Metropolitan Opera Orchestra in New York city. The bass comes with a quilted bag.

item.title: Petros 4 String Bass 2001 - Hand Made by Matt Petros — $800

Four string bass built by legendary guitar builder Matt Petros. Curly maple pick guard, drop D tuner, everything on this bass is amazing quality. Like new. Includes stand, case and two sets of pick ups. The Bartoni pickups were the original pickups and the previous owner changed them out. This is a work of art by Wisconsin guitar maker Matt Petros. Search out Petros Guitar on here on Reverb to see more of his work. This is literally a one of a kind.

item.title: ESP LTD M-1004 Electric Bass in Black B-Stock — $1,039.20
item.description:
$1,039.20 · B-Stock · LV Guitars

ESP LTD M-1004 Electric Bass in Black B-Stock

The M-1004 delivers the immediate feel of a professional instrument—the extra-thin U-shaped neck sits comfortably in hand, while the neck-thru construction provides rock-solid stability and sustain. This bass was engineered for working musicians who demand reliable performance night after night, whether onstage or in the studio.

Build & Playability

Neck-thru construction anchors a solid alder body and three-piece maple neck, creating an instrument built to last. The Macassar ebony fingerboard features 24 stainless steel XJ frets with a 400mm radius and 42mm nut width, combining durability with smooth, responsive playability across all registers.

Tone & Electronics

Fishman Fluence SB-1 active pickups power this bass with articulate, punchy tone and exceptional clarity. A push/pull volume control switches between full humbucker and single-coil voicings, while the 2-band EQ and 3-way mini switch voice selector provide extensive tonal shaping for any musical style.

Key Features
  • Neck-Thru body construction for enhanced sustain and stability
  • Alder body with three-piece maple neck
  • Macassar ebony fingerboard
  • 24 stainless steel XJ frets
  • 35" scale length
  • 400mm fingerboard radius
  • 42mm nut width
  • Extra-thin U-shaped neck contour
  • Molded nut
  • Fishman Fluence SB-1 active pickups with voice select
  • Push/pull volume control with humbucker/single-coil switching
  • 2-band EQ and 3-way mini switch
  • Grover tuners
  • Gotoh 201B-4 bridge
  • Black finish

item.title: Cort Basses Artisan Series | C4 Plus OVMH - Antique Brown Burst — $533.30
item.description:
$533.30 · Brand New · The Music Shop

The Cort C4 Plus OVMH 4-String Bass is a remarkable bass guitar with a sleek, ergonomic design and high-end active electronics that produce a powerful bass tone. Featuring dual active Bartolini MK-1 pickups, this instrument delivers deep and warm tones, ensuring your presence on stage, during practice, and in the studio. The Markbass MB-1 Preamp provides the flexibility to shape your sound with a 3-band EQ, active/passive switching, master volume, and pickup balancer, allowing you to create a unique and personal tone that defines your bass's voice.

Designed for exceptional playability and stunning style, the Cort C4 embodies an instrument that ignites your ambition and creativity. With a maple and mahogany body carved into a double-cutaway shape, you can effortlessly reach the highest notes without any strain or difficulty. The Canadian hard maple neck and sleek jatoba fretboard ensure smooth transitions between frets, enhancing your overall playing experience.

Features

Pickups that deliver a powerful punch

The Cort C4 Plus boasts a pair of Bartolini MK-1 active pickups, renowned for their ability to cut through the mix with sheer force. Crafted to provide your bass sound with an added layer of depth, these active pickups produce rich, warm mids and shimmering highs, resulting in a perfectly balanced tone that exudes quality.

Not only are they versatile, but they also excel in various musical genres, from punk to rock and even pop. The C4 Plus allows you to find the ideal balance between the two pickups with its 3-way pickup selector, enabling you to customize your tone to suit your preferences. Embrace a unique sound and define your bass's voice with your own style, creating a truly personalized performance.

Play with unrestricted freedom

Bass playing should never feel like a chore. However, playability is often overlooked when searching for a new bass guitar. Thankfully, Cort understands the importance of this aspect and has meticulously fine-tuned every detail of the Artisan C4's design to deliver an effortless playing experience, free from constraints.

Featuring a Canadian hard maple neck and a sleek jatoba fingerboard, the C4 is ideal for both picking and slapping techniques. Transitions between frets are incredibly smooth, thanks to the silk-like surface of the fingerboard. Moreover, the double-cutaway mahogany body allows you to effortlessly reach the highest notes without any stress or struggle. This enables you to solo, slap, and pick for hours of practice and performance.

Masterful Markbass technology

Prepare to be amazed. The Markbass MB-1 EQ system integrated into this guitar provides you with unparalleled control over your tone. Equipped with treble, mid, and bass dials, you can fine-tune your sound until it's absolutely perfect. The pickup balancer, along with the active-passive switch, allows you to achieve the ideal voicing for your pickups. This additional tool in your bass's arsenal opens up limitless possibilities for inspiration.

Reliable performance

Featuring a dual string loading system, the MetalCraft M4 bridge ensures optimal string tension and enhanced sustain for a rock-solid performance. With individual slots that securely hold the saddles in place, this high-mass bridge is perfect for demanding bassists who seek the best. The MetalCraft M Bridge takes your sound to the next level with its user-friendly design and unwavering focus on tone transfer.

  • Scale: 864mm (34'')

  • Neck Pickup: Bartolini MK-1 Pickup

item.title: RAVEN DAN ARMSTRONG STYLE LUCITE BASS — $1,799
item.description:
$1,799 · Good · Stang Guitars

This is a super cool and rare Dan Armstrong copy of the famous Lucy Bass!

These are usually found with the Univox label. This guitar was distributed in Canada and most of the Canadian sold guitars were branded with the Raven brand. These are identical to the Univox versions with the exception of the logo. They are made by Matsumoku in Japan in the early 1970s.

The bass is in good condition and includes case!

item.title: Cort GB Short Scale - Fandango Purple — $347.41
item.description:
$347.41 · Brand New · The Music Shop

The Cort GB Short Scale Bass gives you big tone in a compact, comfortable design. With its 30″ scale length, you’re getting a warm, punchy response that’s incredibly easy to play, especially if you prefer a softer feel or shorter reach. A lightweight poplar body keeps long rehearsals and gigs comfortable, while the roasted maple neck adds stability, smoothness, and a fast feel under your fingers. Whether you’re practicing at home or performing live, it’s a bass that feels instantly inviting.

A Powersound humbucker delivers a mix of thick lows, clear mids, and crisp highs, giving you plenty of versatility from one pickup. Paired with the Markbass MB-1 preamp, you can shape your sound with precision thanks to its powerful three-band EQ and three-way selector switch. From funky low-end warmth to bright, articulate slap tones, this short-scale bass punches well above its size and price. Finished in a bold Fandango Purple gloss, it’s a standout instrument that brings colour, character, and creativity to any bassist’s collection.

Features

Short scale comfort

The 30″ scale makes this bass an absolute joy to play, giving you lower string tension, an easier reach, and a smoother overall feel. If you’re moving up from guitar, have smaller hands, or just prefer a more relaxed playing style, you’ll immediately notice how approachable it is. Even with its shorter scale, the bass still maintains a strong, punchy response that sits confidently in any mix.

Roasted maple feel

The roasted maple neck and fretboard give you a noticeably stable and refined playing surface. Roasting removes excess moisture from the wood, improving durability and giving the neck a sleek, fast-moving character you’ll appreciate during long sessions. Combined with a gentle C-shape profile and matte finish, it’s a neck that feels familiar from the first moment you pick it up.

Powersound humbucker versatility

The Powersound humbucker brings the best of both worlds: warm rounded lows and bright, defined highs. Whether you’re playing smooth soul lines or need a more aggressive edge for rock, this pickup responds with clarity and authority. Its voicing suits a wide range of genres, making it ideal for players who want a single-pickup bass that doesn’t compromise on flexibility.

Markbass MB-1 tone shaping

The onboard Markbass MB-1 preamp adds serious tonal control, letting you tailor your sound with bass, middle, and treble adjustments. The three-way pickup function selector opens up even more tonal combinations, allowing series, split, and parallel styles of response from the humbucker. It’s a powerful system that ensures your tone stays articulate, expressive, and ready for the stage or studio.

item.title: Fender James Jamerson Signature 1962 Precision Bass - 3-Tone Sunburst — $2,999.99
item.description:
$2,999.99 · Brand New · Motor City Guitar

The James Jamerson 1962 Precision Bass – your gateway to the legendary sound that powered the Motown revolution.

James Jamerson is widely recognized as the single most influential bassist of all time. Consistently ranked #1 on “greatest bassists” lists, he laid down the groove on dozens of hit songs that defined the Motown sound. His incredible musical prowess and signature style didn’t just define a genre – Jamerson rewrote the rulebook for what was possible on electric bass, influencing legends like Paul McCartney, Marcus Miller, John Entwistle, and Geddy Lee.


The Bass That Built Motown

Jamerson’s signature instrument was his beloved 1962 Precision Bass – the foundation beneath countless hits that shaped popular music forever. This stunning eracorrect tribute instrument celebrates James’ legacy and his inseparable association with the Precision Bass, delivering the authentic vintage sound and feel that defined an era.


Authentic Vintage Craftsmanship

Every detail honors the original, from the premium Heirloom Nitrocellulose Lacquer finish to the era-correct neck shape that captures the feel of Jamerson’s legendary instrument. The custom James Jamerson ‘62 Precision Bass pickup celebrates those unmistakable tones that anchored the Motown hit factory.


Premium Heritage Features

The Heirloom Nitrocellulose lacquer finish delivers the authentic spirit and aging characteristics that made the original so special. The premium tone and meticulous attention to detail ensure this bass performs to the highest professional standards. Experience the James Jamerson Precision Bass and feel the difference that inspired generations.

STORE POLICIES

PAYMENT

When processing a transaction through Reverb.com, we accept Reverb Payments, Affirm or any form of payment accepted through the Reverb platform only. Payment is required within 24 hoursof purchase or accepted offer. Orders not paid within this timeframe will be canceled.

SHIPPING

Please allow up to 3 business days for order processing and handling. Most orders ship on Tuesdays and Fridays.

    •    Small items are shipped via USPS.

    •    Guitars and amplifiers are shipped via UPS or FedEx.

    •    We currently ship to the United States (lower 48 states) only for our stated shipping price.

    •    International buyers should contact us prior to purchase for shipping availability and a quote.

    •    Orders will only be shipped to the address provided through Reverb and this address cannot be changed after the order is placed.

If expedited shipping/handling is needed, please contact us before purchasing.

RETURNS

While we do not accept returns, we offer a 3-day verification period to ensure your item arrives as described.

Please keep in mind that vintage instruments, amplifiers, and effects may operate differently than modern equipment and may exhibit normal age-related wear or imperfections, such as scratchy pots or cosmetic blemishes. Buyers are responsible for familiarizing themselves with the proper operation and requirements of vintage gear before purchase. Tone Chasers Music is not responsible for misuse of items.

LOCAL PICKUP

Items purchased for local pickup must be collected within 3 days of purchase, unless prior arrangements have been made.

Failure to pick up an item within the agreed timeframe will result in order cancellation. A 15% restocking fee will be deducted from any applicable refund.

That said, if you have a special need or request, get a hold of us and we’d be happy to work with you.

item.title: Fender Player II Jazz Bass, Rosewood Fingerboard, Rallye Orange — $849.99
item.description:
$849.99 · Brand New · Bill's Music

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender® sound and style with the Player II Jazz Bass® — a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

The Player II Jazz Bass radiates timeless Fender charm, but under the hood, it's primed for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern “C”-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5”-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Single-Coil J bass® pickups offer sweet highs, growling mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. An adjustable 4-saddle bridge, single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.

Perfect for crafting your own sound, the Player II Jazz Bass has the looks, tone and feel that only a Fender delivers.

Features
  • Contoured Alder Body
  • Modern "C" Neck Profile
  • 9.5“-Radius Maple or Rosewood Fingerboard with Rolled Edges
  • Player Series Alnico V Single-Coil Jazz Bass® Pickups

PLAYER SERIES PICKUPS A modern tweak of our classic sound, our Player Series pickups are designed with more power and more bite, for authentic Fender tone—with a bit of an edge. item.title: Squier Vintage Modified Jaguar Bass Special SS with Upgrades — $875
item.description:
$875 · Excellent · Adam's Axe Apothecary

Ripper of a bass. Upgrades include EMG passive Geezer pickups with solderless wiring harness, Fender highmass bridge, new knobs, Zero-Mod Thumbrest. This bass was fun to start with but the EMG Geezers and Highmass Bridge have taken this bass to another level. The thumbrest really helps. There are a couple of minor scrathes on the control plate and a few pickguard swirls but the body and neck are perfect. Dingless and scratch free. Original pickups, wiring harness, bridge and knobs will be included.

Currently string with rounds but an extra set of Ernie Ball Slinky Rounds and a lightly use sets of GHS and Rotosound Flats will also be included. Three extra sets of strings! Will ship with padded Fender branded gigbag.

item.title: McGrath Thunderhorse 2026 - Vice City — $3,700
item.description:
$3,700 · Brand New · McGrath Guitars

Thunderhorse – 12-Way Rotary Selector

The J-Style body shape is a new chapter in the McGrath range. Designed as a functional art piece, it features deep, ergonomic contours and a perfectly balanced profile that eliminates neck dive. The sculpted heel allows for effortless access to the higher register.

While the J-Style offers the same customization found in our Rebel and P-Style models, the Thunderhorse name denotes our signature three-pickup configuration developed in collaboration with The Bass Channel. This specific build features a vibrant Vice City finish inspired by the upcoming release of Grand Theft Auto VI.

Triple Threat Tone

This instrument features a trio of DiMarzio Billy Sheehan Signature Relentless pickups. The neck pickup offers a warm, wooly punch, the middle pickup delivers a signature growl, and the bridge pickup provides a glassy snap from its 70s positioning.

The bass features our new 12-way Rotary Selector for massive tonal versatility. The settings are:

All 3 Parallel

Bridge Only

Middle Only

Neck Only

Bridge & Middle Parallel

Middle & Neck Parallel

Bridge & Neck Parallel

Bridge & Middle Series

Middle & Neck Series

Bridge & Neck Series

Bridge & Middle Series + Neck Parallel

All Three Series.

The rotary also functions as a button:

Save: Long-press to save your current setting.

Recall: Push to jump to your saved favorite, then push again to return to your previous setting.

Reset: Triple-tap to return to position 1.

Failsafe: If power is lost, the switch defaults to position 1 (All 3 pickups in parallel).

The bass is also equipped with a Trickfish IPA 3-band EQ. The control layout features the 12-way rotary at the lower horn, a master volume with a push-pull active/passive function, and bass, mid, and treble controls.

Performance & Build

We moved the neck pickup back 3/8 of an inch to create a dedicated landing zone for slap players without sacrificing deep low-end.

The body is resonant, lightweight solid mahogany paired with a roasted flame maple neck. The neck is reinforced with carbon fiber rods and utilizes a two-way spoke nut truss rod for on-the-fly adjustments.

This bass also features our new premium High Gloss Finish.

The bass shown in these photos is the exact instrument you will receive. We are a two person team based in San Diego, California,  we put our heart and soul into every one off build. 

Model: J-Style Thunderhorse

Finish: Vice City

Body: Solid Mahogany

Neck: Roasted Flame Maple with Carbon Fiber Reinforcement

Fingerboard: Ebony with a 12-inch Radius

Frets: Medium Jumbo Stainless Steel

Nut Width: 1.5-inch J-Style

Scale Length: 30 inches Short Sacle

Weight: 8.3 lbs

Pickups: DiMarzio Billy Sheehan Signature Relentless Neck and Relentless J Pair

Electronics: McGrath Guitars 12-way Rotary Selector, Trickfish IPA 3-band EQ

Bridge: Badass II High Mass

Tuners: Badass Lightweights

Hardware: Black

Pickguard: Simulated Anodized Gold

Strings: D'Addario 45 to 100

Case: Gator Hardcase Included

item.title: Italia Modulo 2003 - Gold/Champagne Sparkle — $850
item.description:
$850 · Excellent · Lost Signal Instrument Co.

Up for sale is a rare/discontinued and very eye-catching Italia Modulo 4-string electric bass. Designed by Trevor Wilkinson with a nod to 1960s retro-futurism, the Modulo features an eye-catching agathis body in a gold/champagne sparkle finish, framed nicely by a pearloid pickguard. Turn the bass over, and you'll find an immaculate black faux-crocodile skin back. This is Italia's take on a Precision-style bass: familiar layout, but with unmistakable styling and a very unusual giant humbucker pickup. Each lipstick pickup can be raised and lowered to adjust the volume of an individual string. Despite its oddity, it still produces the precision bass thump we all know and love.

This bass is in excellent cosmetic and playing condition. The electronics work perfectly, and the frets are clean, polished, and practically new. The bass has a bold vintage/space-age look but remains very user friendly: passive volume/tone controls, comfortable P-style body shape, chrome bridge cover, Italia-branded tuners, and a striking stage presence.

Great choice for collectors of unusual basses, fans of Danelectro/lipstick-style tones, Italia collectors, retro/surf/garage players, or anyone who wants a bass that looks completely different without being a fragile wall-hanger.

Condition Description: Excellent / near-mint used condition. Exceptionally clean overall, with no obvious dings, scratches, buckle rash, or cosmetic damage visible from normal viewing angles. The gold sparkle finish, pearloid pickguard, chrome hardware, bound body edge, and faux crocodile-textured back all present beautifully. Electronics have been tested and work properly. Frets have been polished/crowned and show little to no wear, and the bass is currently fitted with nearly new strings. As with any used instrument, there may be very minor handling marks visible under close inspection or direct light. Please review all photos.

Additional Specs:

Weight - 10.5lbs

Nut Width - 1.5"

12th Fret Width - 2.2"

Neck thickness at 1st Fret - 0.8"

Neck thickness at 12th Fret - 1.1"

item.title: Fender Player II Precision Bass guitar, Maple Fingerboard, Black Gloss - MIM — $849.99
item.description:
$849.99 · Brand New · Butler Music

Fender Player II Precision Bass guitar, Maple Fingerboard, Black Gloss - MIM     Butler Music is stocking all 99 models of the new Player II Series, with multiple items in stock of most of the models. To accurately reflect the quality of these great updated models, we will be using actual photos of each guitar we post as well as sending them out set up and ready to play and including the weights of each guitar or bass so you will know exactly what you will be getting. This one carries the serial number MX26007150 and weighs in at 8 pounds, 8.86 ounces.    The all-new Player II Series advances the massively popular Player formula. Player II new features include never-before-used vintage auto colors, rosewood fingerboards, upgraded bridges and hardware, rolled fingerboard edges, new neck tint, aged plastic parts, as well as new body wood options in resonant chambered ash and chambered mahogany. By keeping the essence of what made the original series great – Player Pickups, modern ”C”shaped necks, 9.5” radius fingerboards and medium jumbo frets, the new Player II Series expands on that solid foundation with a wide range of upgrades and new options. Designed for players ready to take that next step in their musical journey, Player II is the new benchmark for affordable quality and performance.   Here is some of the info on this particular model of bass guitar.    Body – Alder Body Finish – Black Gloss Polyester Neck – Maple – Modern “C” Neck Finish – Satin Urethane finish on back of neck and Gloss Urethane finish on the front Fingerboard – Slab Maple, 9.5” (241mm) Frets – 20, Medium Jumbo Position markers – Black Dot Nut Material & Width – Synthetic Bone , 1.6250” (41.3mm) Tuning machines – Fender Standard Open Gear Bass Tuners Scale length – 34” (86.36cm) Bridge – 4 saddle standard Pickguard – 3-Ply Parchment Pickups – Player II Series Alnico 5 Split Single-Coil Precision Bass pickup in the middle Pickup switch – NONE Controls – Master Volume, Master Tone Knobs – Knurled Flat Top Hardware/Finish – Nickel/Chrome Strings – Fender USA 7250M Nickel plated steel .045-.105 Case or gig bag – NONE

item.title: Ibanez 250th USA Anniversary Premium SR5A250 5-string Electric Bass Guitar w/ Gigbag — $1,299.99
item.description:
$1,299.99 · Brand New · Bill's Music

Ibanez 250th USA Anniversary Premium SR5A250 5-string Electric Bass Guitar 5-string Electric Bass, Limited Edition, with Mahogany Body, Panga Panga/Purpleheart Neck, Panga Panga Fingerboard, and 2 Split-coil Pickups   Show off your American pride with this limited-edition SR5A250 from Ibanez, designed to commemorate the USA's 250th anniversary and honor the legacy of American guitarists. Sporting vivid splatters of red, white, and blue over its African mahogany body and headstock, a rock-solid 5-piece panga panga/purpleheart bolt-on neck, and a bound panga panga fingerboard, the Premium SR5A250 is a boutique-quality instrument with impeccable playability. That quality is borne out of its pair of aggressive Nordstrand Big Break pickups, which deliver massive, roaring tone infused with monumental sustain. The 5-piece neck is reinforced with KTS titanium rods, with premium Gotoh tuners on one end and a resounding MR5S bridge at the other. Ibanez's Custom Electronics 3-band EQ completes the setup, ensuring your onboard bass-shaping capabilities provide the control you need to craft the perfect tone. Whether you're playing July 4 showcases or big-stage, patriotic performances, the Ibanez 250th USA Anniversary SR5A250 is a collector’s piece that sounds just as impressive as it looks.   Ibanez 250th USA Anniversary Premium SR5A250 Features:
  • Limited-edition 5-string bass with custom-painted red, white, and blue artwork over an African mahogany body, celebrating the USA’s 250th birthday
  • 5-piece panga panga/purpleheart bolt-on neck with Atlas-5 profile and KTS titanium rods means tour-grade stability, robust adaptability, and satisfying in-hand tactility
  • Bound panga panga fingerboard features 24 frets and a 12-in. radius for flexible yet focused control and playing precision
  • Graph Tech Black TUSQ XL nut ensures your sounds stay stable and buzz-free
  • 2 Nordstrand Big Break pickups support diverse performance possibilities with resounding presence and articulation
  • Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ for versatile tone shaping
  • EQ bypass switch (passive tone control on treble pot) expands onboard sonic-contouring tools
  • MR5S bridge enhances articulation and sustain

item.title: Fernandes APB-100 5 String Active Bass Transparent Black Finish MIJ #59353 — $795
item.description:
$795 · Good · Techno Empire

WORKING CONDITION: Good. The action on this bass is low and fast, and it snaps and pops.  It could use new strings, fret polishing, and some general TLC, but nothing is preventing it from being put into service upon arrival. The controls and tuners operate well, and the low B string is punchy and clear.

PHYSICAL CONDITION: Good. There are some blemishes, light dings, scratches and signs of use peppered throughout all sides of the body. It was definitely played. The producer who gave it to us (Michael Vail Blum) said he used it on sessions with the band "Suicidal Tendencies". The neck is in good condition, and the hardware is still relatively shiny with only normal wear. 

INVENTORY #59353

BRAND: Fernandes

item.title: Fender American Performer Mustang Bass Maple Fretboard + CASE! - Honey Burst — $1,199.11
item.description:
$1,199.11 · Excellent · Jim Pearson Guitars

About my “nearly New” truly beautiful Fender USA SATIN American Performer Mustang Bass with Aftermarket (but AWESOME) Case

Guitar weight (not including case or case goodies): 9 lbs, 7 oz.

Neck thickness at the 1st fret: 0.94 inches

Neck thickness at the 12th fret: 1.03 inches

This bass originally came with a flimsy Fender Gig Bag. I bought the case because it deserves it! It’s just shy of mint! The paint is as original, with a satin sheen which helps the body breathe over the years. It has an excellent pickup combination.

This SHORT SCALE lovely bass is nearly free of humanity! It has a very special Mustang bass middle pickup, a Jazz Pickup, a gorgeous sunburst finish (satin), and so much more to offer! 

I have nice half-flat strings installed: it plays like an absolute dream!

Note: There is no warranty on this guitar from Gibson. I will, however, place a personal 2-year Jim Pearson Guitars Warranty for electronics failures to post-sale-UNMODIFIED instruments I sell.

I don’t have to sell this guitar. Low-ball offers are ignored.

Looking for one which is in excellent condition and has only been briefly adult-, studio-played? This is a great choice!

An advantage with buying an instrument or gear from me: You can purchase a used instrument which has been well-cared-for when you purchase from me.

Shipping

At this time, I do not ship outside the United States of America. I am truly sorry. I have lost way too much money trying to do so.

Please note: I try to set shipping prices appropriately and fairly: given these factors: Any instrument sold with a case will be much heavier than just the weight of the instrument itself. Harrdshell cases are almost always much heavier than the instrument.

·       I use great boxes and lots of packing materials. This adds a lot to the shipping weight.

·       Also, using a great box means larger dimensions. The shippers can really up the price for a box the right size for an instrument.

·       I like to use UPS for my instrument shipping. Of all the shippers I’ve used in the past 25 years, UPS has done the best and has damaged the fewest of my shipments.

·       I truly can’t ship for free. Even shipping a single humbucker insured across the country costs almost $10 (as an example).

·       As my buyers come from all over the US, I set my prices as the approximate average from someone near me and someone on the west coast. I also look at the going rate charged by other sellers: this helps me see if the price I’m asking is similar to those sellers who are private sellers.

Returns

No returns: As-is:

As I am not an actual commercial factory-authorized instrument dealer, I truly can’t afford to sell instruments on an approval basis or offer free returns. I try to describe carefully and truthfully, price accordingly, and I really make a big effort to ship your new gear to you quickly and safely.

As such, my instruments are being sold as-is and without returns. The only cases where returns are allowed are when I grossly mis-describe the instrument. I ship insured and ship with Reverb protection on every instrument (even on parts and small things)! If there is a shipping issue, Reverb is awesome about helping you work out any issues which might occur.

Jim Pearson Guitars’ Story!

I enjoy recording for private contracts, and I enjoy releasing my own compositions worldwide through almost all streaming and CD sales services.

Over the past 22 years, I have released 8 experimental albums and 10 commercial Impressionistic Instrumental albums. The musical expressions and impressions I have recorded have led me to try and experiment with more than 100 different instruments. The retail instrument purchases I have made over the years has led me to build up a “library” of guitars, basses, keyboards, and many others.

The instrument in this listing was purchased by me through retail channels, including local, state, and federal taxes. I am offering this instrument because I am heading into retirement: I need to slim down to just a small subset of instruments.

What’s the advantage for you? I take incredibly good care of my instruments. I take the time to set the instruments up to my needs and specifications. I keep them clean, in a humidity- and temperature-controlled environment.

Important notes!

I liked it enough to buy it - All of us have different interpretations of “Mint” or “Excellent” or other conditions. I try to generally understate the condition, as I don’t like surprise issues any more than you do.

These might not be the droids you are looking for - “Mint” is generally, “great condition with small signs of use.” To me, Mint does not mean “superbly flawlessly correct and museum quality” just as an example.  I want us to both be happy. Ask questions: I do answer questions within the day, in general.

Remember: people make these instruments… they will have small flaws or imperfections – and that’s why I like human-made instruments! Swirls are almost always present in even expensive brand-new instruments… Typically, I use only very special cloths to maintain my instruments: I only use maintenance oils and finish conditioners which are kind to the instrument.

STORE POLICIES

PAYMENT

When processing a transaction through Reverb.com, we accept Reverb Payments, Affirm or any form of payment accepted through the Reverb platform only. Payment is required within 24 hoursof purchase or accepted offer. Orders not paid within this timeframe will be canceled.

SHIPPING

Please allow up to 3 business days for order processing and handling. Most orders ship on Tuesdays and Fridays.

    •    Small items are shipped via USPS.

    •    Guitars and amplifiers are shipped via UPS or FedEx.

    •    We currently ship to the United States (lower 48 states) only for our stated shipping price.

    •    International buyers should contact us prior to purchase for shipping availability and a quote.

    •    Orders will only be shipped to the address provided through Reverb and this address cannot be changed after the order is placed.

If expedited shipping/handling is needed, please contact us before purchasing.

RETURNS

While we do not accept returns, we offer a 3-day verification period to ensure your item arrives as described.

Please keep in mind that vintage instruments, amplifiers, and effects may operate differently than modern equipment and may exhibit normal age-related wear or imperfections, such as scratchy pots or cosmetic blemishes. Buyers are responsible for familiarizing themselves with the proper operation and requirements of vintage gear before purchase. Tone Chasers Music is not responsible for misuse of items.

LOCAL PICKUP

Items purchased for local pickup must be collected within 3 days of purchase, unless prior arrangements have been made.

Failure to pick up an item within the agreed timeframe will result in order cancellation. A 15% restocking fee will be deducted from any applicable refund.

That said, if you have a special need or request, get a hold of us and we’d be happy to work with you.
